summary: Completed testing of Negative-Binomial totals model feedback loop implementation for MLB picks. All backend APIs, pytest suite, and frontend UI components verified successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: All 855 pytest tests pass (including 16 NB-specific tests in test_totals_negative_binomial.py)
Backend: GET /api/mlb/run-evaluations/summary returns new fields (totals_dispersion_by_bucket with pressure/f5/fragility/park dimensions, nb_vs_poisson_aggregate, headline)
Backend: All bucket dimensions present with correct structure (available=false when empty, n=0)
Backend: smart_total_line_selector returns NB telemetry (dispersionRatio, poissonProbUnder, nbProbUnder, underCalibrationDeltaPts)
Backend: build_v2_payload returns complete totalsModel block with all 8 required fields
Backend: NB fragility bump applies ONLY to UNDER picks with positive delta_pts (OVER picks untouched)
Backend: mlb_run_storage.build_run_evaluation_document persists totals_model, expected_total, actual_total, pressure_tier, fragility_tier, park_runs_mult, is_f5_market fields
Frontend: MLBCalibrationPanel renders on /history page when baseball picks exist
Frontend: Panel shows all 4 KPI cards (current-ratio, empirical-ratio, hit-rate, nb-delta)
Frontend: Panel shows insight block with appropriate message
Frontend: Panel shows all 4 bucket tables (pressure, f5, fragility, park) with correct structure
Frontend: Graceful handling when sample_size=0 (KPIs show '—', bucket tables show n=0, insight shows 'Aún no hay suficientes liquidaciones')
Frontend: Login flow with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 works correctly
Frontend: No console errors on /history page
Frontend: Conditional rendering works (panel only shows when tracked picks include baseball)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (855/855 tests pass, all new fields present and correct)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components render correctly, graceful degradation works)

frontend_ui_components.conditional_rendering: works (only shows when baseball picks exist)
